final:
module johnson_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [2:0] q
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      q <= 3'b000;
    end else begin
      q <= {~q[0], q[2:1]};
    end
  end

endmodule
